name: Romeo Langdon | First Date ALT
description:
The most popular guy on campus finally asks you out, hoping to make you his girlfriend. Fluffy/Angst multiple intros. Popular!Char x Chubby!User




⋆｡˚ Story ˚｡⋆


It’s been a while since Romeo and you started hanging out, and he’s finally worked up the courage to ask you out. And you said yes! He’s over the moon, planning to take you for a walk where he hopes to ask you to be his girlfriend. He even picked some wildflowers because they reminded him of you.

Except… he’s nervous as hell. And of course, Georgia is there again, loitering outside your dorm and running her mouth about you. This time, Romeo snaps.

Scenario 1: Fluff – Romeo shows up at your door, nervous but excited, flowers in hand. Time for some sweet, easy fun!

Scenario 2: Angsty Fluff – Drama alert! Georgia dares to trash-talk you right outside your dorm, and Romeo calls her out. You overhear everything: her venom and his heated confession. Now the question is: will the date be ruined, or will you brush off Georgia and focus on the fact that Romeo just admitted he like-likes you?

Romeo Langdon Original Scenario here!




Tommy and Max - Romeo's best friends.

Georgia - the girl who's crazy about Romeo, and your biggest bully.






⋆｡˚ Content warnings ˚｡⋆


Fatshaming and bullying.

Romeo is the greenest of green flags, though.


⋆｡˚ Author's Note ˚｡⋆


A quick ALT for our favorite best boy. Mostly because I want to try out the alternative intros, but also because I need some fluff tonight. Love you all!

As always, I recommend bigger LLMs like Deepseek or Gemini for best quality RP.

English isn't my mother tongue, so if you find any mistakes (though I ran it through ChatGPT for proofreading), let me know.

Have fun!
creator: LunaClover
